# Obsidian Volleyball Academy

> Premium junior volleyball academy in Baulkham Hills, Sydney Hills District. Holiday camps and term programs for juniors aged 8–18. Volleyball NSW affiliated.

## About

Obsidian Volleyball Academy (OVA) was founded in 2025 to bring elite-standard volleyball coaching to junior players in the Hills District of Sydney. Based at Baulkham Hills High School, OVA runs holiday camps during school holidays and weekly term programs during the school year.

All coaches are Volleyball NSW accredited with Working With Children Checks and First Aid certifications. Players are grouped by skill level (beginner, intermediate, advanced), not age.

OVA is affiliated with Volleyball NSW, ensuring coaching standards and player pathways align with state-level development programs.

## Key Information

- Location: Baulkham Hills High School, Windsor Road, Baulkham Hills NSW 2153
- Contact: obsidianvolleyball@gmail.com
- Instagram: @obsidianvolleyball
- Booking: obsidianvolleyball.as.me (via Acuity Scheduling)
- Website: obsidianvolleyball.com
- Ages: 8–18 (juniors)
- Skill Levels: Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced
- Affiliation: Volleyball NSW

## Programs

### Holiday Camps
Intensive skill-building camps during school holiday periods (April, July, October, January). Full-day sessions 9AM–1PM with half-day options available. 5-day camp package: $200 including free OVA shirt.

### Term Programs
Weekly programs running during school terms for ongoing development. All skill levels catered for.

### Beginner Blast (Ages 8–12)
For players with no experience. Covers fundamentals: serving, passing, setting, court awareness. High coach-to-player ratio.

### Skill Builder (Ages 10–16)
For intermediate players ready to compete. Advanced serving, attacking, defence, blocking, tactical play.

### Elite Program (Ages 13–18)
High-intensity performance volleyball. Video analysis, physical conditioning, Volleyball NSW pathway preparation.

## Coaches

### Melinda — Head Coach & Co-Founder
Volleyball NSW Accredited Coach. Founded OVA in 2025. Specialises in beginner and intermediate development. First Aid certified, WWCC verified.

### Jessica — Lead Coach
Volleyball NSW Accredited Coach. Competitive playing background. Leads intermediate and advanced sessions. First Aid certified, WWCC verified.

## Location & Nearby Suburbs

Baulkham Hills High School is central to: Castle Hill, Kellyville, Cherrybrook, Bella Vista, Winston Hills, Northmead, North Rocks, Carlingford, West Pennant Hills, Dural.

Free on-site parking. Indoor courts — sessions run rain or shine.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What age groups do you cater for?
A: Juniors aged 8 to 18, grouped by skill level not age.

Q: Where are the camps held?
A: Baulkham Hills High School, Hills District, Sydney. Indoor courts.

Q: My child has never played volleyball — is that OK?
A: Yes. The Beginner Blast program is specifically designed for kids with zero experience.

Q: How do I book?
A: Book directly at obsidianvolleyball.as.me. Select your program, pay online, receive confirmation.

Q: Are your coaches qualified?
A: All coaches hold Volleyball NSW accreditation, Working With Children Checks, and First Aid certifications.
